holdings.infoBox: SOXX is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 11.85%, Advanced Micro Devices at 8.94%, Marvell Technology at 8.30%, Intel at 6.22%, and Broadcom at 5.76%.

overview.description: The iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE Semiconductor index, a modified market-cap-weighted index of 30 US-listed semiconductor companies. SOXX was launched on Jul 10, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Why It Is Time to Stop Buying Chip Stocks
data.text: Sales and profit estimates for chip companies have moved higher, valuations have expanded—and volatility is picking up. What to do.
